overview: The Village of Weston Tourism Commission held its first meeting following reorganization, electing officers and approving a $5,000 grant request for the Taste and Glow Balloonfest. The commission noted that a competing balloon event in Marshfield was canceled, potentially increasing attendance at the Weston event.
presiding: Trusty Erling, Chair (elected at this meeting)

agenda.item: Call to order and Pledge of Allegiance
Minutes of the previous meeting - April 21st
New business - Grant request: Taste and Glow Balloonfest
Remarks from staff and commission members

discussions.body: Trusty Erling was nominated and elected as Chair unanimously. Cushing was nominated for Vice Chair, seconded by Jackson, and approved unanimously. Renee was nominated and elected as Secretary unanimously.
The minutes from the April 21st meeting were approved. Motion was seconded by Renee and passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Grant Request - Taste and Glow Balloonfest
discussions.body: Brandon Jill of 3308 Green Pastures Lane presented on behalf of the Taste and Glow Balloonfest. He reported approximately 11,000-12,000 attendees last year and announced that a competing Marshfield balloon event was canceled due to permit issues, making theirs the sole hot air balloon event in the area. Commission members questioned room usage, noting the application showed 20 fewer rooms than last year. The commission approved a $5,000 grant matching last year's amount, with a request that the applicant track and report hotel room usage data. Motion passed unanimously.

Renee reported attending the Alice in Dairyland dinner at Red Rock Orchard in Edgar. She described meeting the candidates, noting the winner Anastasia had three bachelor's degrees. She highlighted this was the first time the event was hosted in Marathon County since the 1970s, and candidates expressed appreciation for the community.

actionItems: Approved $5,000 grant to Taste and Glow Balloonfest for their annual event
Taste and Glow Balloonfest representatives to provide hotel room usage data in their post-event report
Next meeting scheduled for July 20th at 4:00 PM (tentative)
title: Tourism Commission
